chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 415 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.19 2. For orders on CMA No.2679/2017 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.2680/2017 29.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
